ItacPersonItem.Notes: Joined the Ricovrati in 1634. In April 1634, delivered an oration in praise of the Captain of Padua, Girolamo Ciurano. In 1645, he discussed the following problem in a public gathering of the Academy: `Se fosse di maggior utile alla Repubblica o la clemenza di Cesare, o la severita` di Catone`
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
